HistoryMy ReviewsSettingsLog outWindowsPersonalizationThemesExnessExness for Windows Free4.425 125.8KV1.0.1.0Free Download for WindowsView an ad to download for freeSoftonic review Seamless trading environment for Windows users Exness Trade, developed by Exness, provides a Windows-compatible platform for digital asset trading, focusing on efficiency and accessibility. Designed for MT5 accounts, it allows users to monitor and manage trades across currencies, commodities, indices, and stocks. The platform includes demo account support, charting tools, price alerts, and risk management features, helping traders practice and manage positions effectively. While spreads and execution speed vary with market conditions, Exness Trade delivers a functional environment for both new and experienced users seeking a stable trading workflow. Top Recommended AlternativeTradingViewFree4.4 Streamlined trading and account managementThe platform integrates account management with real-time monitoring of open positions, including balance, equity, and margin tracking. Users can customize watchlists, receive notifications for market events, and access up-to-date news within the app. Demo accounts allow risk-free practice to learn platform tools or test strategies. Exness Trade is compatible with Windows systems and maintains consistent usability across devices. Integration with the broader Exness ecosystem supports straightforward fund transfers and account overview without requiring additional software. Focused tools for market analysis and executionExness Trade offers advanced charting and analysis features to track asset performance and identify trading opportunities. Users can set price alerts, place market or pending orders, and manage risk with stop-loss and take-profit functions. While some promotional claims describe rapid execution and commission-free trading, these factors vary by account type and market liquidity. The app provides core trading functionality without overcomplicating the interface, emphasizing clarity and efficiency for both practice and live trading. Balanced and practical trading platformExness Trade delivers a clear and functional trading experience tailored for MT5 users on Windows. Its combination of account management, analysis tools, and demo account support makes it suitable for beginners and intermediate traders. Users should note that spreads, execution speed, and commissions depend on account type and market conditions. Despite these limitations, the platform provides a dependable framework for trading and strategy development in digital asset markets. ProsSupports MT5 trading accounts for a wide range of assetsIncludes demo account functionality for practiceOffers customizable watchlists, price alerts, and analysis toolsCompatible with Windows and integrates with the Exness ecosystemConsMT4 accounts are not supported on this appSpreads and execution speed vary with market conditionsCommission-free claims depend on account typeNo detailed system requirements providedApp specsLicenseFreeVersion1.0.1.0Latest updateFebruary 4, 2026PlatformWindowsOSWindows 11Downloads125.8KLast month's downloads9KDeveloperExness GlobalAdd reviewReport SoftwareExness for PC Free4.425 125.8KV1.0.1.0Free Download for PCView an ad to download for freeUser reviews about ExnessHave you tried Exness?
